utterances.speaker: Student
utterances.text: Guess what , I got an audition !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Awww , one of my students got an audition . I am so proud .

emotion_cause.span: 2_one of my students got an audition .

utterances.speaker: Student
utterances.text: I was wondering if you would consider coaching me for it ?

emotion_cause.span: 3_I was wondering if you would consider coaching me for it ?

utterances.speaker: Student
utterances.text: Oh it is great , it is a role on All My Children , Nick the boxer .

emotion_cause.span: 5_it is great , it is a role on All My Children , Nick the boxer .
